description: Inspect the repository without a model round-trip
Map workspace crates and release risks
command: Inspect Cargo.toml, README.md, and the primary crate manifests. Return a JSON map of the workspace crates, the main public interfaces, and the top release risks that still deserve attention.

Read crates/agent-core/src/control.rs and crates/agent-daemon/src/control_socket.rs, then return a JSON object summarizing the control-plane transport, auth model, implemented features, and remaining gaps.

description: Review dashboard asset and route integration
command: Review crates/agent-daemon/static/dashboard.html, crates/agent-daemon/static/dashboard.js, crates/agent-daemon/static/dashboard-chat.js, crates/agent-daemon/src/dashboard.rs, and crates/agent-daemon/src/routes.rs. Return a JSON review with concrete findings and residual risks for dashboard bootstrap, asset serving, and chat/session behavior.

description: Plan the next provider debt reduction pass
command: Inspect crates/agent-providers/src/lib.rs plus the provider support modules. Return a bounded refactor plan for the next provider debt-reduction pass with clear steps and verification.
Read docs/plugins.md plus the plugin-related Rust modules, then summarize the current plugin lifecycle, runtime execution path, and the biggest remaining risks before release.
